Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd59/18e32a7f/4b5e4302/7b209241/993238076/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd59/18e32a7f/4b5e4302/7b209246/993238076/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd59/18e32a7f/4b5e4302/7b209247/993238076/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd59/18e32a7f/4b5e4302/7b209243/993238076/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd59/18e32a7f/4b5e4302/7b20924d/993238076/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd59/18e32a7f/4b5e4302/7b209244/993238076/VEsEBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United. Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today? ""** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, "". If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on "" or "" or "" or online at www.benraylujan.com_. Click "" to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. Peter,

I know your inbox is flooded with emails asking for money... **[but this email is different.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=35c839087b924af09807bf33cb23457d&_e=R0g2x43b9lWyIVLBk7ROKkr9m-boMpQwh8hrU9pby8u49znB0ZU2u8YocIJ9TqNhT0uuTpRwyT8EiVxad9y2lJXmRsX7xnvqlF7HW7o4fiNq7MLwVbnoOorfHtAoJJhJjRMjh3QwLLGhGiH86BJPbXihuFdR0kSwVtOK1Ntf3Ij1OR-iM0u-rN0Zk8RIDyyF4IddixYklIKy9PCsfeHWWsd4WAwFu4PGi3ckvRRLZ5N8XBp51L_lcSf8SxXlcx8y0xBcbkOFXY3Pm7qO7LpUUs7coKW_PUp3bW1F_Umxyac7UQyXV7qEQvZ7JJZiZva18i-36DaidS8BLlaQv9ERJBda7ydFVzYn-ggh-AqKP7fkMO1vvAuQU8JFNQbrbRML)**

**[As far as our October fundraising numbers are concerned, we’re behind. And I can’t sugar coat it. We’re down nearly $10,000 from where we were this time last month.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=35c839087b924af09807bf33cb23457d&_e=R0g2x43b9lWyIVLBk7ROKkr9m-boMpQwh8hrU9pby8u49znB0ZU2u8YocIJ9TqNhT0uuTpRwyT8EiVxad9y2lJXmRsX7xnvqlF7HW7o4fiNq7MLwVbnoOorfHtAoJJhJjRMjh3QwLLGhGiH86BJPbXihuFdR0kSwVtOK1Ntf3Ighybdp4wpjyhooVkDWrKxrWq3lcpc8HU09VtI137IWgaywWvVY_mGCg2ghh9Imt-vAefnV6NL5t94Mm0E2OLHE8v48w7TqnubzCz8WFazVVp53ioLEGy2YhptpkIEfmyvuKR96AHEvfbY75mUr5qmGc2XSxywqS-8nXGaq5KVaK-hjtnkHwLKV1dnnz84SYppYE-XeRkms1XZQljJ89TNm)**

I wish it weren’t the case, but since we have just 3 days left until Election Day, we’re getting creative with ways to ask you to help us reach our financial goals.

The Democrats are treating this election like it’s a game to be played and they have no problem cheating to win. **The only games I play are bingo and baseball, Peter.**

But in the spirit of competition and to prove to the out-of-touch Democrats that I don’t have to cheat to win, **[I am asking each of my supporters to join in on this fundraising game.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=35c839087b924af09807bf33cb23457d&_e=R0g2x43b9lWyIVLBk7ROKkr9m-boMpQwh8hrU9pby8u49znB0ZU2u8YocIJ9TqNhT0uuTpRwyT8EiVxad9y2lJXmRsX7xnvqlF7HW7o4fiNq7MLwVbnoOorfHtAoJJhJjRMjh3QwLLGhGiH86BJPbXihuFdR0kSwVtOK1Ntf3IjAU-DWOIqzs5bvBjD3rRplgJHawpZy9ZBvn2hzG-tLjH5BW0xtBVuQuk9xTcdSKkd_4bWLuKFMikQgDcQTYDmZUoEHcb-ZFGtTCD6qIeU4jnz2QX7fCgvFWaxHCU3X9Hxh4PyFlWixEaNztIu33VXFyfL5SnRtA3G7QjYnJARYb9YS6_zoJXM-S8jFuIVi8wke-Bei352WvKP8hna_NKwP)**

clean_body: 3 hours to our final fundraising deadline - can you help? | Peter, I know your inbox is flooded with emails asking for money... I wish it weren’t the case, but since we have just 3 days left until Election Day, we’re getting creative with ways to ask you to help us reach our financial goals. The Democrats are treating this election like it’s a game to be played and they have no problem cheating to win. The only games I play are bingo and baseball, Peter. But in the spirit of competition and to prove to the out-of-touch Democrats that I don’t have to cheat to win, | We have 30 squares with different donation amounts. My goal is to receive a donation of each square’s amount from strong conservative patriots across the nation. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We have just THREE days to fill the squares and raise $10,000 that we need to finish out the campaign. I owe everything to your generosity. Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Follow Alek On Social Media | ---|--- www.alekfororegon.com Don't want to receive our emails? | Paid for by Alek for Oregon

But the pace is slowing down a little right now, and with the deadline is in just a few hours, we're | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525112/45c30650/1c773dd94/66eb457f/2346813105/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

After a good surge in grassroots donations earlier today, we're almost at our end-of-October goal.

But the pace is slowing down a little right now, and with the deadline is in just a few hours, we're not quite where we need to be.

**[Please chip in $2 if you can before midnight to help elect Democrats like Elizabeth up and down the ballot. Your donation could be the one that makes sure we reach this goal.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525112/45c30650/1c773dd94/66eb457e/2346813105/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW9jdDIwLXdlZWtseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1XMjNGX0VPTV9MQ05fVF8yMDIwMTAzMV9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-oct20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW23F_EOM_LCN_T_20201031_V1S1_P")**

With only a few days left to reach voters, it's crunch time -- and Elizabeth is going all out to make sure we elect Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Warren Democrats across the country.

This weekend, she's getting out the vote in New Hampshire and Maine. In the past few days, she's done local interviews to get the word out in Wisconsin, Minnesota, Michigan, and Nevada.

And we're in this fight right by her side. This grassroots team is making phone calls, sending texts, and reminding everyone to make their voices heard by Tuesday -- the most important election of our lifetimes.

**We need to throw everything we can into this fight.**

**[Midnight is the last grassroots fundraising deadline of this campaign, and we still need to hit our goal to fully fund our outreach. But the pace is slowing down a little right now, and with the deadline is in just a few hours, we're not quite where we need to be. "" With only a few days left to reach voters, it's crunch time -- and Elizabeth is going all out to make sure we elect Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Warren Democrats across the country. This weekend, she's getting out the vote in New Hampshire and Maine. In the past few days, she's done local interviews to get the word out in Wisconsin, Minnesota, Michigan, and Nevada. And we're in this fight right by her side. This grassroots team is making phone calls, sending texts, and reminding everyone to make their voices heard by Tuesday -- the most important election of our lifetimes. We need to throw everything we can into this fight. subject: FW: this is your last chance
body:
No images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jujululd-kujkulhluu-m/

Friend,

I wanted to bring my last email to the top of your attention. This is urgent.

This is the most critical point of the entire year- we are DAYS away from the election and I need you with me.

We are about to enter into a major battle against the Democrats with so much at stake. This is the last chance you have to contribute to our October fund.

That’s why right now, more than ever, I need you to immediately chip in $25 for a limited-time-only DOUBLE match. [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/october-end-of-month/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20201030_eom2_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

CHIP IN: $25 = $75 [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/october-end-of-month/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20201030_eom2_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1] OCTOBER END OF MONTH FUND >> [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/october-end-of-month/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20201030_eom2_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

There is so much on the line, and there are only days left before we have the chance to show Washington that Ohioans value their freedom and refuse to be led by socialists.

Will you join us in doing so right now? [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/october-end-of-month/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20201030_eom2_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

–Steve Chabot

-----begin forwarded message-----

Friend,

We are heading into the final weekend ahead of the 2020 election.

This is your LAST chance to help us beat a major deadline... And stop the Far-Left and their radical agenda from becoming elected next week.

If they win, they are threatening to hike taxes and defund the police at the very first chance they get.

This has been a record-breaking campaign so far, but we need one last push to make it through to Election Day. This will be the MOST important fund you could contribute to.

OCTOBER END OF MONTH FUND >> [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/october-end-of-month/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20201030_eom2_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

The Democrats do not want us to reach this goal.

Will you chip in $25 immediately? Help be defeat their dangerous agenda. [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/october-end-of-month/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20201030_eom2_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

Ohioans deserve a representative focused on results, not one who would become the fifth member of the Socialist Squad in Washington.

Friend, will you do all you can right now to help the future of Ohio? We need common sense leadership, not a radical agenda.

–Steve Chabot

DONTE NOW! [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/october-end-of-month/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20201030_eom2_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1] Chabot for Congress, P.O. “Ladies and gentlemen I am officially running for President of the United States, and we are going to make our Country great again. It can happen. Our Country has tremendous potential. We have tremendous people.”

- Donald J. Trump, Trump Tower June 16, 2015
We’ve come a long way together.

>From the moment I announced my candidacy and took my famous escalator ride, to when I placed my hand on the bible on January 20, 2017, to be sworn as the 45th President of the United States, to this moment, I have loved every minute of fighting for the American People.

With your help, my administration has accomplished more than anyone thought possible.

We have implemented HISTORIC tax cuts, nominated 220 Federal Judges - including THREE Supreme Court Justices, decimated ISIS, negotiated peace agreements in the Middle East, negotiated the USMCA, and we are leading a strong economic comeback.

But, all of that incredible progress will vanish if we don’t secure another VICTORY on Election Day. There is only one way to defend your dignity. There is only one way to defend your family and your Country. There is only one way to preserve, protect, and defend the American Way of Life:

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca089858bbecc283b78b7c252ef22e7588f5ba31cec002e7e1597a192b98feac6c203d057a4b31837fa257381029c335d47d2bdf6546ea32
WE MUST WIN ON NOVEMBER 3RD.
I need you now more than ever, Friend. Our movement did not come this far and fight this hard to throw it all away. This is your LAST CHANCE to step up and send a message to the Radical Left that the American People will REJECT their corrupt candidate.

For the final time, I am offering you one more chance to increase your impact by 1000% and get on the last donor list I see before Election Day.

You’ve always been one of my best supporters - I know you won’t let me down.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ca089858bbecc283b78b7c252ef22e7588f5ba31cec002e7e1597a192b98feac6c203d057a4b31837fa257381029c335d47d2bdf6546ea32

It can happen. Our Country has tremendous potential. We have tremendous people.” - Donald J. Trump, Trump Tower June 16, 2015 We’ve come a long way together. From the moment I announced my candidacy and took my famous escalator ride, to when I placed my hand on the bible on January 20, 2017, to be sworn as the 45th President of the United States, to this moment, I have loved every minute of fighting for the American People. With your help, my administration has accomplished more than anyone thought possible. We have implemented HISTORIC tax cuts, nominated 220 Federal Judges - including THREE Supreme Court Justices, decimated ISIS, negotiated peace agreements in the Middle East, negotiated the USMCA, and we are leading a strong economic comeback. But, all of that incredible progress will vanish if we don’t secure another VICTORY on Election Day. There is only one way to defend your dignity. There is only one way to defend your family and your Country. There is only one way to preserve, protect, and defend the American Way of Life: WE MUST WIN ON NOVEMBER 3RD. I need you now more than ever, Friend. Our movement did not come this far and fight this hard to throw it all away. This is your LAST CHANCE to step up and send a message to the Radical Left that the American People will REJECT their corrupt candidate. For the final time, I am offering you one more chance to increase your impact by 1000% and get on the last donor list I see before Election Day. You’ve always been one of my best supporters - I know you won’t let me down. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to help us secure FOUR MORE YEARS and to increase your impact by 1000%. >> CONTRIBUTE $20 = $220 CONTRIBUTE $15 = $165 CONTRIBUTE $10 = $110 CONTRIBUTE $5 = $55 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT Joe Biden is a corrupt politician who has done nothing but betray you for 47 long years. He sold you out to lobbyists, China, Big Pharma, and foreign countries. He will stab you in the back again and again. He only cares about political power and he will use that power to hurt you and enrich himself and his cronies. We cannot let him destroy America. I’ve requested to see the FINAL DONOR LIST before Election Day. This is your LAST CHANCE to publicly stand with me. Don’t let me down. Contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW to stand with your President and to get on the FINAL DONOR LIST I see. Thank you, Donald J. name: Betsy
subject: 60 Minutes in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
**_Ohio is the bellwether._** Tune in to 60 Minutes tonight to hear from Ohio voters, and see our ad! All eyes are on Ohio because the polls in Ohio are neck and neck. We can take back our country and Ohio can make clear what the outcome of the election is on November 3. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/e6-dgCOeWy2PW_cX0i_AYZZwAg0dKpUbZ8IAhIW8og8=/eZpr2kMwoRVUZqeNXGz-4uZzjpkuWhGnA6QmMSoLxP4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/e6-dgCOeWy2PW_cX0i_AYZZwAg0dKpUbZ8IAhIW8og8=/eZpr2kMwoRVUZqeNXGz-4uZzjpkuWhGnA6QmMSoLxP4=) So many of you chipped in to get us the funds we needed to run an ad which will tonight reach thousands of voters who have been fed non-stop lies by my opponent. **Thank you.** **[If you can, there 's still time to chip in another $15 to help us continue ad buys and keep our campaign strong in order to keep reaching voters through election day.](https://act.myngp.com/el/e6-dgCOeWy2PW_cX0i_AYZZwAg0dKpUbZ8IAhIW8og8=/39X1keJJ3dYBGUYfOv5JZ-GLwac5WypwK6-nmPe4nMY=?refcode=11.1&amount=15)** Thank you for your support! _**Texas' 2020 early voting surpasses total turnout in 2016 election**
-CNN_ [_**Chip in right now to keep up the momentum.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21062665/259411814/1282836671?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201101GOTV1_TK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGViMDc4MC01ZjFjLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KnjUTOy3CTzQw5tm5pcau6EzIgYfTPJvvPYWm587pTI=) This is astonishing, friends. Every vote cast over the 2016 threshold means we’re that much more likely to win on Election Day. And we’re going to win this thing because Democrats and pragmatic Republicans in Central Texas want to see real leadership for our district — not the corrupt self-service of Pete Sessions. After a long election season, there are now just 3 Days standing between the people of Florida and an overwhelming conservative victory for our district.
And we still have time to reach out to undecided voters and get them our team before this important Election Day! But in order to do so, [we're going to need your urgent support.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012Y3kECv9v0zoDlUJNWpLk93VtKwreCU7fJObqJZSezH-5GvZgvttlT9hc7Yt8DoY-Zf0gD_wWDh-ZKmwB1EE5jd6az5MW8UFhJOwLct7wdNCTcxVzwuz4KftbA1bV3mKS_Ym56uPL43Ld6sUG4UfY9LrEVqWo5DmZEg-SllB8Ng=&c=AVR20kGMxDCjgmjbwb9SbVhHqZCBQOkPB0ks06XCqPeFO2WAcurDUw==&ch=D8ancmEP9-iMawsoBPIdUxFOIX4UbkEaD0_pASXWP0eZFckngbdx7w==)

name: HON Patrick J. Murphy
subject: Show our 29 veteran candidates that we have their backs to HOLD THE HOUSE and FLIP THE SENATE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

As a former member of Congress and Under Secretary of the Army under President Obama, folks are asking me how they can help hold the House and flip the Senate in these final days. Here's what I tell them:

[**_Support our candidates at Taking the Hill!_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/XaRLIpEv53hse6_1UhqF2YaC6v3fQ-NDCu_XIYhEyUY=/XBhpk6UN20rVGxtvn6zFDg1YfJI7JoAxHZnF6Jb3tbA=)

At Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members of integrity running for Congress in tough races. Today, [we are proud to support 11 US Senate and 18 US House candidates](https://act.myngp.com/el/XaRLIpEv53hse6_1UhqF2YaC6v3fQ-NDCu_XIYhEyUY=/XBhpk6UN20rVGxtvn6zFDg1YfJI7JoAxHZnF6Jb3tbA=) \- and if _they_ win, _we_ win. In the Senate, we support candidates like Amy McGrath, Mark Kelly, Theresa Greenfield, Cal Cunningham, and Raphael Warnock. In the House, we support candidates like Jackie Gordon, Amy Kennedy, Gina Ortiz Jones, Dan Feehan, and Conor Lamb. You can view our full slate [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/XaRLIpEv53hse6_1UhqF2YaC6v3fQ-NDCu_XIYhEyUY=/XBhpk6UN20rVGxtvn6zFDg1YfJI7JoAxHZnF6Jb3tbA=).

But here's the thing: [**_our candidates need your help._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/XaRLIpEv53hse6_1UhqF2YaC6v3fQ-NDCu_XIYhEyUY=/XBhpk6UN20rVGxtvn6zFDg1YfJI7JoAxHZnF6Jb3tbA=) We need to raise $35,000 in the next 48 hours to keep our candidates on the air in crucial battleground states, to help them reach voters and bring as many people to the polls as possible.

We are matching EVERY contribution dollar-for-dollar between now and Election Day. So here's my last ask of this election cycle: [**_Can you chip in today to support these honorable candidates - and can you forward this E-mail to others in your network who can chip in, too?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/XaRLIpEv53hse6_1UhqF2YaC6v3fQ-NDCu_XIYhEyUY=/XBhpk6UN20rVGxtvn6zFDg1YfJI7JoAxHZnF6Jb3tbA=)

I am so proud of these candidates. I am so proud of those of you reading this message. And I am so proud of our country. Together, we will hold the House and flip the Senate. Together, WE WILL WIN.

In solidarity,

Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
[@PatrickMurphyPA](https://act.myngp.com/el/XaRLIpEv53hse6_1UhqF2YaC6v3fQ-NDCu_XIYhEyUY=/UdclxueTrfFZ4gH13ctd9Oi-mKEfMoRitXbdRxzdOcc=)

PS - If you have some spare time after you've chipped in, make sure to [sign up to make phone calls for these candidates](https://act.myngp.com/el/XaRLIpEv53hse6_1UhqF2YaC6v3fQ-NDCu_XIYhEyUY=/trPGtQ-k6PfGQsi-KkPXz0ZlIkIswFqmslF5LDBOFmo=) and [Joe Biden](https://act.myngp.com/el/XaRLIpEv53hse6_1UhqF2YaC6v3fQ-NDCu_XIYhEyUY=/MZx5q3pOiN5NGexu3lAhtMObClPzLYtlLMJ6qfu2X5U=)!

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC

name: =?utf-8?Q?Patrick=20Kibbe?=
subject: Friend, we can win this! 📣
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
We have the numbers, now we just need your help to keep the momentum going. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b9f18ef927&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

I spent this weekend going over the numbers. _We can win this. _

We often hear how this District has been gerrymandered to help Republicans. It's true. But it is also true that if everyone in this District voted, we would win. In 2012, Jackie won this Congressional seat with 49% of the vote. Since that time, the majority of new voter registrants have been Democratic. And we have more Democrats who do not vote each year than Republicans. [We’ve got the numbers, it’s about getting them to the polls.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=5f546e08ed&e=5886ca081d)

Over the last two months, together we’ve made over 40,000 calls and 50,000 texts to voters in this District telling them about Pat’s message. This weekend, we have hundreds of volunteers making thousands more calls to Get Out the Vote.

**It’s working. 135,000 people have already voted. And based on our data about who has cast their ballot, we’re winning. Let me say that again:_We are winning._ [We just need to keep it up for the next three days.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=992ffbe289&e=5886ca081d)**

But we need your help. The money we raise over the next three days is critical to our layered GOTV efforts through TV, digital, calls, and texts. We cannot emphasize enough, Friend, how important your financial investment is this morning to meet our fundraising goal for GOTV. Your investment will go directly to getting Pat’s message out to our supporters and to getting people out to the polls. Will you contribute to help us win?
[If everyone pitches in a little, we can do a lot.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=eceaf06e1d&e=5886ca081d)

---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9713890b67&e=5886ca081d "EXPRESS DONATE $25")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=51587c7b31&e=5886ca081d "EXPRESS DONATE $50")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=121bde6c6a&e=5886ca081d "EXPRESS DONATE $100")
---
| [DONATE SOMETHING ELSE](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=54fba9e38c&e=5886ca081d "DONATE SOMETHING ELSE")
---
| _If you’ve saved your information with ActBlue, your donation will go through automatically._

**This is a people-powered campaign. It always has been. Let’s win on November 3 for Dignity and Justice for All!**

Thank you,
Patrick

We simply cannot allow the Radical Left to undo all my father’s incredible progress. They’ll RAISE your taxes, DESTROY energy jobs, and let CHINA take advantage of us like never before.

name: Jerry Carl
subject: ** Election Night Watch Party **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jerry Carl for Congress
body:
🎉 See details inside on our election night party.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/c8eee7e8c51bc27f/771f56cb7ea92bfbc3d6b838967d376c/32613) Fellow Conservative, We’re coming up fast on Election Day 2020. We’re staying busy around the clock now working to close strong, win this race to keep south Alabama RED, and do all we can to support Coach Tuberville and President Trump. **Today, I just wanted to drop a quick note to personally invite you to our Election Night Watch Party at Cafe del Río in Daphne.** We’re going to have food, beverages, and TVs set up to watch the election results come in throughout the evening. There’s no need to RSVP. Just mark your calendar for 7:00 p.m. on November 3rd and come out to join us! Here’s the address for Cafe del Río: **1175 Battleship Parkway, Daphne, AL 36527.** And of course, if you haven’t voted yet, please make your plan to cast your ballot now for **JERRY CARL for Congress**. Urge your family and friends to do the same! Thank you for all your support. I hope to see you Tuesday evening!
\- Jerry | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/c8eee7e8c51bc27f/751b7954bdb0ebbac3d6b838967d376c/32613) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/c8eee7e8c51bc27f/909f7885f0a41342c3d6b838967d376c/32613)

body:
Friend,

I hope you'll take a few minutes to read this email, because what I have to tell you is critical to our nation's future.

Right now, the Democrats across the nation are working around the clock to "flip the Senate". They have a bullseye on specific states and races and right now they are zeroing in on my good friend, Senator Dan Sullivan's race in Alaska.

**As a Colonel in the U.S. Marine Corps Reserve, Senator Sullivan is no stranger to a tough fight. And that 's what is happening right now in The Last Frontier. **

If Alaska turns blue, the Senate will turn blue as well. And that would mean Chuck Schumer's in charge -- and Friend, I know I don't even need to tell you the utter destruction to our economy and nation Chuck would do.

So, I'm writing to you today because that's a scenario I refuse to let happen. And that's why I'm going to do everything I can to ensure Dan Sullivan stays in the Senate!

clean_body: Friend, I hope you'll take a few minutes to read this email, because what I have to tell you is critical to our nation's future. Right now, the Democrats across the nation are working around the clock to "flip the Senate". They have a bullseye on specific states and races and right now they are zeroing in on my good friend, Senator Dan Sullivan's race in Alaska. As a Colonel in the U.S. Marine Corps Reserve, Senator Sullivan is no stranger to a tough fight. And that 's what is happening right now in The Last Frontier. If Alaska turns blue, the Senate will turn blue as well. And that would mean Chuck Schumer's in charge -- and Friend, I know I don't even need to tell you the utter destruction to our economy and nation Chuck would do. So, I'm writing to you today because that's a scenario I refuse to let happen. And that's why I'm going to do everything I can to ensure Dan Sullivan stays in the Senate! == == Democrats are working feverishly to turn Alaska blue, and we've got to do everything we can to ensure that doesn't happen. Even if you don't live in Alaska -- which you know I don't!! -- this race will impact you and your family. The balance of the Senate hangs on a few races, and it's imperative we keep Alaska RED. == == Our future is on the line. Let's take a stand today to fight for it! Sincerely, Senator Tim Scott == Paid for by Alaskans for Dan Sullivan 3705 Arctic Blvd #447 Anchorage, Alaska 99503 == == | | Alaskans for Dan Sullivan | 3705 Arctic Blvd #447, Anchorage, AK 99503 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

subject: Why we need to finish strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
"Let us run with endurance the race that is set before us." This has been a long, hard election year. I am so proud of the outstanding effort Republicans have made so far, living the above Scripture. But %%First Name%%, don't grow weary. There is still further to go.
Friend,

_" Let us run with endurance the race that is set before us."_

This has been a long, hard election year. I am so proud of the outstanding effort Republicans have made so far, living the above Scripture.

[**But Friend, don 't grow weary. There is still further to go.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/finish-strong/?utm_campaign=20201101_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1039093-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201101_why-we-need-to-finish-strong)

name: John Cornyn
subject: could TX flip?
body:
Friend, A few days ago, the Cook Political Report changed Texas status from Lean R to Toss Up.
In simpler terms, this could be disastrous.
I've been telling you that Texas is a battleground state for weeks, but this report really spells trouble.
**[Texas is on the line November 3rd, and it's in HUGE jeopardy of being flipped BLUE unless you chip in RIGHT NOW to help defend our RED Texas.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qBTiVmPYumFs8G8TBA40XzDyP55-vgcM34YNG6rxJ5lXDu_Xhvy_xTHSJiFFQbZ0BzV30uharcfuivQ8dTX5KnZhxWd9tt8CVAiCPQajmGME3IkVtWoomTz05wUYqanWveAsxmcDLxiyZdS_gnB9zVPYgEZZ_uJZTX4PQkHg2trVqz55mQBl3SoG86GbUuQ7iV-yBMCwcPk_2STj4ZbCPhJgNvYNzE733nJZzblEBYy5I6LTE6aJmz9V2NPF4-A8xjQouNC2Yx_rXZH075FQigg3VQnn7rRJf_u3ktzcCZB6KblTgM4uUJZ76rEsmhhm_2fHNoY-aOW36hqIzBoRulsfldUEJFmAS_-8joJ8OgQHDpzfsACGgw==&c=po-9HNgJW2SvODysUJoOoed9mxr3gnZusj8eoc7M29bdl6SS3qc97w==&ch=jwHcsqdqPkR5DXtkDenuAnbHE96m1EOBVkAo-cHp2b6LAYAxihLWgQ==) ** [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qBTiVmPYumFs8G8TBA40XzDyP55-vgcM34YNG6rxJ5lXDu_Xhvy_xTHSJiFFQbZ0BzV30uharcfuivQ8dTX5KnZhxWd9tt8CVAiCPQajmGME3IkVtWoomTz05wUYqanWveAsxmcDLxiyZdS_gnB9zVPYgEZZ_uJZTX4PQkHg2trVqz55mQBl3SoG86GbUuQ7iV-yBMCwcPk_2STj4ZbCPhJgNvYNzE733nJZzblEBYy5I6LTE6aJmz9V2NPF4-A8xjQouNC2Yx_rXZH075FQigg3VQnn7rRJf_u3ktzcCZB6KblTgM4uUJZ76rEsmhhm_2fHNoY-aOW36hqIzBoRulsfldUEJFmAS_-8joJ8OgSUv2SNrFMQDA==&c=po-9HNgJW2SvODysUJoOoed9mxr3gnZusj8eoc7M29bdl6SS3qc97w==&ch=jwHcsqdqPkR5DXtkDenuAnbHE96m1EOBVkAo-cHp2b6LAYAxihLWgQ==) **ACTION NEEDED: TEXAS LABELED A _TOSS UP!_** [**KEEP TEXAS RED**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qBTiVmPYumFs8G8TBA40XzDyP55-vgcM34YNG6rxJ5lXDu_Xhvy_xTHSJiFFQbZ0BzV30uharcfuivQ8dTX5KnZhxWd9tt8CVAiCPQajmGME3IkVtWoomTz05wUYqanWveAsxmcDLxiyZdS_gnB9zVPYgEZZ_uJZTX4PQkHg2trVqz55mQBl3SoG86GbUuQ7iV-yBMCwcPk_2STj4ZbCPhJgNvYNzE733nJZzblEBYy5I6LTE6aJmz9V2NPF4-A8xjQouNC2Yx_rXZH075FQigg3VQnn7rRJf_u3ktzcCZB6KblTgM4uUJZ76rEsmhhm_2fHNoY-aOW36hqIzBoRulsfldUEJFmAS_-8joJ8OgQpG6J_UpVerQ==&c=po-9HNgJW2SvODysUJoOoed9mxr3gnZusj8eoc7M29bdl6SS3qc97w==&ch=jwHcsqdqPkR5DXtkDenuAnbHE96m1EOBVkAo-cHp2b6LAYAxihLWgQ==) Days separate us from the most consequential election of our lifetime, and now is absolutely the worst time for you to sit idle.
We are in danger of handing Joe Biden Texas 38 electoral votes. From fundamentally changing the soul of our nation.
Our constitutional rights and freedoms are at risk. Our low taxes we count on each month, those could be gone, too. And our healthcare we depend on? Theirs for the taking.
We. Need. All. Hands. On. Deck.
**[Friend, will you please contribute anything you can to help Keep Texas Red?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qBTiVmPYumFs8G8TBA40XzDyP55-vgcM34YNG6rxJ5lXDu_Xhvy_xTHSJiFFQbZ0BzV30uharcfuivQ8dTX5KnZhxWd9tt8CVAiCPQajmGME3IkVtWoomTz05wUYqanWveAsxmcDLxiyZdS_gnB9zVPYgEZZ_uJZTX4PQkHg2trVqz55mQBl3SoG86GbUuQ7iV-yBMCwcPk_2STj4ZbCPhJgNvYNzE733nJZzblEBYy5I6LTE6aJmz9V2NPF4-A8xjQouNC2Yx_rXZH075FQigg3VQnn7rRJf_u3ktzcCZB6KblTgM4uUJZ76rEsmhhm_2fHNoY-aOW36hqIzBoRulsfldUEJFmAS_-8joJ8OgTq_qr9K3r77g==&c=po-9HNgJW2SvODysUJoOoed9mxr3gnZusj8eoc7M29bdl6SS3qc97w==&ch=jwHcsqdqPkR5DXtkDenuAnbHE96m1EOBVkAo-cHp2b6LAYAxihLWgQ==) **

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

body:
With our end of the month deadline, we need your help to finish this race.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mmy5NlB15mcn67T8q4clD4Yh71q29paDm4biunFG0eoBo9-G20VBTYOzPx3XEiP8gJy_rOOYCXfqp9qN_I-nRJgzimjhAeKqZuqg7hKNRa3hdIddFEQDCJKRcB0orFy7ZBRDbJL46YROgpLvWNyq4nvnbGHi4BK8sIwxPwqQKg3NWF4YitVqM5UduEpySu8Xd9AutR3LpNGzu6tkNyzHlfBYZdrD2U0BB4Fw43DJm4YSALaiH47dioWqRsepEfcI3_fwFn7QC0bLfrBjRxO_Y1GfxzU0_kJFibRqqLv6Gk68R74K_BrHRlVqhJ-a4WuZBko42MjwQZoFeSVD4UNKko7T5BA3aE_8oL65PwPLvRRjeyAj9292G53VJGIXDN--_eKtq23KOFR0Ve45_5WwACNVarBj1-NF&c=yu1v76-vTWXfoHFiVtSnMZGSYLlrSPCueHJ7TthY-aXGr7PZJiyjMQ==&ch=KJOG7ewp9Z0ST99lviYNL4HbIbIjrDG7J4pupc07qYGEm6YhRPQb6A==)

Friend, **I am going to be frank here.** As we get closer to next week's election, Nancy Pelosi continues to funnel dark money into Elissa Slotkin's war-chest. _With our end of month deadline fast approaching, we need your help Friend._ **[SEND PAUL JUNGE TO CONGRESS AND SOCIALIST SLOTKIN OUT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mmy5NlB15mcn67T8q4clD4Yh71q29paDm4biunFG0eoBo9-G20VBTYOzPx3XEiP8gJy_rOOYCXfqp9qN_I-nRJgzimjhAeKqZuqg7hKNRa3hdIddFEQDCJKRcB0orFy7ZBRDbJL46YROgpLvWNyq4nvnbGHi4BK8sIwxPwqQKg3NWF4YitVqM5UduEpySu8Xd9AutR3LpNGzu6tkNyzHlfBYZdrD2U0BB4Fw43DJm4YSALaiH47dioWqRsepEfcI3_fwFn7QC0bLfrBjRxO_Y1GfxzU0_kJFibRqqLv6Gk68R74K_BrHRlVqhJ-a4WuZBko42MjwQZoFeSVD4UNKko7T5BA3aE_8oL65PwPLvRRjeyAj9292G53VJGIXDN--_eKtq23KOFR0Ve45_5WwACNVarBj1-NF&c=yu1v76-vTWXfoHFiVtSnMZGSYLlrSPCueHJ7TthY-aXGr7PZJiyjMQ==&ch=KJOG7ewp9Z0ST99lviYNL4HbIbIjrDG7J4pupc07qYGEm6YhRPQb6A==)**
It's no secret that Slotkin has been supported by the Liberal Mob this entire campaign season. They are willing to spend **MILLIONS** on her race because they know she will continue to vote in favor of the Dem's radical agenda.
**[SEND PAUL JUNGE TO CONGRESS AND SOCIALIST SLOTKIN OUT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mmy5NlB15mcn67T8q4clD4Yh71q29paDm4biunFG0eoBo9-G20VBTYOzPx3XEiP8gJy_rOOYCXfqp9qN_I-nRJgzimjhAeKqZuqg7hKNRa3hdIddFEQDCJKRcB0orFy7ZBRDbJL46YROgpLvWNyq4nvnbGHi4BK8sIwxPwqQKg3NWF4YitVqM5UduEpySu8Xd9AutR3LpNGzu6tkNyzHlfBYZdrD2U0BB4Fw43DJm4YSALaiH47dioWqRsepEfcI3_fwFn7QC0bLfrBjRxO_Y1GfxzU0_kJFibRqqLv6Gk68R74K_BrHRlVqhJ-a4WuZBko42MjwQZoFeSVD4UNKko7T5BA3aE_8oL65PwPLvRRjeyAj9292G53VJGIXDN--_eKtq23KOFR0Ve45_5WwACNVarBj1-NF&c=yu1v76-vTWXfoHFiVtSnMZGSYLlrSPCueHJ7TthY-aXGr7PZJiyjMQ==&ch=KJOG7ewp9Z0ST99lviYNL4HbIbIjrDG7J4pupc07qYGEm6YhRPQb6A==)**
Those radical policies include _the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, defunding the police, and packing the Supreme Court._ Make no mistake, Slotkin doesn't listen to her MI-08 constituents **\- she simply takes her orders from Nancy Pelosi.** We should just call her _Socialist Slotkin_ at this point.

We can compete against her dark money donors and Slotkin's Socialist campaign, but we do have grassroots patriots like you, Friend, who have been fighting with us since the very beginning of this battle. This will be one of the **LAST TIMES** you can make a difference in this race. clean_body: With our end of the month deadline, we need your help to finish this race. == Friend, I am going to be frank here. As we get closer to next week's election, Nancy Pelosi continues to funnel dark money into Elissa Slotkin's war-chest. With our end of month deadline fast approaching, we need your help Friend. == It's no secret that Slotkin has been supported by the Liberal Mob this entire campaign season. They are willing to spend MILLIONS on her race because they know she will continue to vote in favor of the Dem's radical agenda. == Those radical policies include the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, defunding the police, and packing the Supreme Court. Make no mistake, Slotkin doesn't listen to her MI-08 constituents \- she simply takes her orders from Nancy Pelosi. We should just call her Socialist Slotkin at this point. We can compete against her dark money donors and Slotkin's Socialist campaign, but we do have grassroots patriots like you, Friend, who have been fighting with us since the very beginning of this battle. This will be one of the LAST TIMES you can make a difference in this race. == == == == == == == == Let's finish this fight and move Paul Junge across the finish line to send real Conservative representation to Congress. body:
He's attacking my husband to distract from his scandal.
| Friend,

I've been campaigning all over the state for my husband now that our election is TIED.

What's Cal Cunningham been doing?

But with his $28 million fundraising advantage over our campaign's $6 million, he could get away with it.

name: Kevin Hern (iPhone)
subject: Polls open at 7:00 a.m. Tuesday – help share the word!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Dear Peter, The 48-hour countdown to Election Day 2020 started this morning and we’re off to another extremely busy day. We’re working around the clock to remind every voter we can reach about all that’s at stake, and to make sure they get out to VOTE on Tuesday. We cannot fall short when it matters most! Please take these two quick actions right now: 1\. If you have not voted early in person or by mail, make sure to cast your ballot on Tuesday. The polls open at 7:00 a.m., and will remain open until 6:00 p.m. You can find your voting information here: [https://okvoterportal.okelections.us/](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/1be307f9aa292567/a15bcf132b8c2228c3d6b838967d376c/34143) 2\. Forward this email to your family and friends and urge them to vote for Kevin Hern for Congress on Tuesday! Thank you, again, for everything. It means the world to me to have you involved with our grassroots campaign team. \- Kevin Hern id:2020-10-15-19:41:18:515t Paid For By Hern For Congress
---

clean_body: Dear Peter, The 48-hour countdown to Election Day 2020 started this morning and we’re off to another extremely busy day. We’re working around the clock to remind every voter we can reach about all that’s at stake, and to make sure they get out to VOTE on Tuesday. We cannot fall short when it matters most! Please take these two quick actions right now: 1\. If you have not voted early in person or by mail, make sure to cast your ballot on Tuesday. The polls open at 7:00 a.m., and will remain open until 6:00 p.m. You can find your voting information here: 2\. Forward this email to your family and friends and urge them to vote for Kevin Hern for Congress on Tuesday! Thank you, again, for everything. It means the world to me to have you involved with our grassroots campaign team. \- Kevin Hern id:2020-10-15-19:41:18:515t Paid For By Hern For Congress

subject: This is the week
body:
This is it. The week we have been waiting for. In two days, all of the votes will have been cast in the most important election of our lifetimes. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d94a752eeba7/this-is-the-week?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
This is it. The week we have been waiting for. In two days, all of the votes will have been cast in the most important election of our lifetimes. We cannot walk away wishing we had done more. We cannot afford that.

Many of you have already contributed to our campaign, **but we need all hands on deck** to oust the ten year Republican incumbent I am running against. This grassroots campaign of ours has turned a once solid Republican race into a competitive one that could swing either way. In a campaign like this one, in a district like this one, every single dollar matters.

My opponent has the backing of powerful super PACs and corporate special interests while I am powered by small dollar donors like you. We have come so far, and I know that we can surprise everyone by flipping the Illinois 16th. [**I need you to rush a $10 contribution today to help us get across the finish line - there is literally no time to wait. **](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=1788e18005&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

Hi, Derek --

Virginians from all walks of life support Mark Warner because he shows up for _all_ Virginians and works hard every day to make sure that everyone in the Commonwealth has an equal shot at success. From the Governor's mansion in Richmond to the U.S. Senate, Mark Warner has always put Virginians first.

**On Tuesday, November 3rd, we have the opportunity to make sure he stays in the Senate, working for us.

[Virginia is Warner Country. Help us keep it that way.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9f8/53d9897e/55194946/1c88cffe/576599870/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-allva?refcode=20201101_f_1_nd__934__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

-- Team Warner

As Governor, John Carney has focused on the issues that matter to Delaware families - jobs, public education, quality of life and health care. He's also committed to listening, to hearing the concerns of all Delawareans, and working together productively.

**There are 2 days until Election Day. **

Share the below message with your friends and family so we can continue to work together to strengthen communities across our state.

He's also committed to listening, to hearing the concerns of all Delawareans, and working together productively. There are 2 days until Election Day. Share the below message with your friends and family so we can continue to work together to strengthen communities across our state. == | == Still have your vote-by-mail or absentee ballot? Do not put your ballot in the mail. Drop your ballot off at a == in your county. If you're voting in person on Tuesday, November 3, make your plan today: == == == == == == Paid for by Friends for John Carney Friends for John Carney PO Box 2162 Wilmington DE 19899 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please ==.

With Election Day right around the corner, we wanted to show you what your generous donations could do to DIRECTLY help Kat Cammack TODAY as she looks to become the newest Republican Congresswoman here in the state of Florida.
[With a donation of $50](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DqbOvpNgwv-YEGi6Yjm4L21OaXuZs9tadaY9hO4eO2wSmA-ngB9j2tbr7a5znydP8UPSQ7TXEL00PLdR-UqKaEeWP5Lb5z9X9QmwiR3R0IV0pgwIFKCGGslUv-3jVNsSfD4Kx9x3DQn2nkF3aJHuVFinGjb77OoPy9jT3Wt7WvvwDXiVNxr7rsk4fCOVuBOTw3hcOx-O4Io=&c=pavE8eBBgzQbUaN9dveISzyPZJtuW3gXMn_BMjtOH1VxDDHcmfntOg==&ch=uM0feh6cIQH7KxdPURxRJkDgDZxmPrElFqe2w-1vqv5GsXjZ080d1g==), you can fund the efforts of our grassroots team on the ground as they look to knock on more doors and reach out DIRECTLY to voters in FL-03.

[With a $250 donation](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DqbOvpNgwv-YEGi6Yjm4L21OaXuZs9tadaY9hO4eO2wSmA-ngB9j2tbr7a5znydPhFrZwGtwlWRt-Tg_DIphAXyzMrOArS5YfpRqb9r-mBF4Q282jazc7r6UdhLlW1SJr_tlR8PU0h6-pl_75iHE-8qmlsPr8FkuK8CJ8GICc0mIssWnCuGhQggRaQH9JYG6cJqEBxJRCUg=&c=pavE8eBBgzQbUaN9dveISzyPZJtuW3gXMn_BMjtOH1VxDDHcmfntOg==&ch=uM0feh6cIQH7KxdPURxRJkDgDZxmPrElFqe2w-1vqv5GsXjZ080d1g==), you can SPONSOR the Kat campaign's newest ad and ensure that it stays up on the airwaves for an entire day!

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Thank you for investing in a better future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8212%2E868730%2EbGdNnA) Friend, Thank you. We had an ambitious final end-of-month fundraising goal of $75,000 in grassroots donations -- and we hit it. Because of the investments of folks like you. Now, it's one last sprint to Election Day. In a few days, I hope our country will choose a different path forward, one where Washington state can support the work ahead, rather than fight back. The progress we make here can and should be emulated across the country -- and because people like you believe it too, I have every hope in the world we can win here at home, take back the White House, and fight for what's right again. It's because of your investment in that future that I have that hope. Thank you for that. You'll own every win this week. Very truly yours, Jay | [DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13602?t=4&akid=8212%2E868730%2EbGdNnA)

name: House DFL Updates
subject: Three days: voter information
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CZt_oDK3foNcwBirOUFT6XZ44cLauxBMhp-aDjoZlNc=/wo7Ul96-hnivJ4sOE63XPXUF2PhCyAwwVws5KWC0i3c=?refcode=110120)
| | Friend, We are sure that you don't need reminding, but the last day of voting for the 2020 election is this coming Tuesday - less than three days away. We wanted to send you a link and some information about where you can vote. [**Voting information**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CZt_oDK3foNcwBirOUFT6XZ44cLauxBMhp-aDjoZlNc=/V2EoqQTuC94QagA7cSmQ2JykuORA-T57WuPHwwdHK8Q=) A few things you should know:
* If you have an absentee ballot you have not returned yet: **do not mail in your ballot.** There are drop off locations available for you to safely and securely deposit your ballot. Make sure to do so by 3pm on Election Day.
* If you are not registered to vote you can still do so on Election Day.
* You can still vote early in person.

We hope this information and the link above are helpful in you making your 2020 voting plan. Minnesota is proud to be one of the highest voter turnout states in the country. A record number of Minnesotans have voted early, but we need to make sure every person makes their voice heard. Thank you, Minnesota House DFL P.S. Don't forget, if you haven't donated yet this year, **Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state through the Minnesota PCR Program.** Take advantage of this program before it is too late. [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CZt_oDK3foNcwBirOUFT6XZ44cLauxBMhp-aDjoZlNc=/wo7Ul96-hnivJ4sOE63XPXUF2PhCyAwwVws5KWC0i3c=?refcode=110120)
---
| Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.

name: Margaret Good
subject: urgent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21073634/259456908/-940294256?refcode=110120-es-gotv-fr-4-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ExOWM0OC04ZTFjLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GpzoX388nDD6meg8QaZISfocaC4mIudGoz-XbaYdr-E=&emci=3efbb917-8e1c-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&emdi=87a19c48-8e1c-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)

I’ll get right to the point. Democrats are falling behind in turnout to Republicans here in Florida’s 16th Congressional District and we need your help to close the gap.
Friend,

I’ll get right to the point. Democrats are falling behind in turnout to Republicans here in Florida’s 16th Congressional District and we need your help to close the gap.

A few days ago, we set an ambitious online fundraising goal of $25,000 to fund our Get Out The Vote efforts in the final days of the campaign, and thanks to an outpouring of support over the past few days, we are getting closer to reaching our goal, but still have $7,250 left to go.

**We are in a statistical tie according to the latest poll, and it’s all going to come down to turnout, which is why I’m asking for your help right now.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Downing?=
subject: Motor City Madman Makes Montana Stop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA (R)
body:
Trump Jr. and Ted Nugent Stop Rally in Kalispell |
---
| | [ ](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=2ce23d21fe&e=a212bb87cc)
---
| |
# Trump Jr. and Ted Nugent Headline Huge Rally in Kalispell

Last night, Donald Trump Jr. and Ted Nugent headlined a rally in Kalispell in support of Senator Daines' re-election, Donald Trump's re-election, and supporting Montana GOP nominees.
[](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=25adf4c02a&e=a212bb87cc)[](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=5c3d79279d&e=a212bb87cc)
In attendance were Sen. Daines, Congressman Gianforte, Commissioner Rosendale, MTGOP Chair Kaltschmidt. Supt. Arntzen, and [yours truly](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=abf7fbd14f&e=a212bb87cc "Troy Downing for Montana").

The message was simple- **control of the senate, the future of America, and the future of Montana all hinge on this election.** We need to make sure that we hand-deliver our ballots if they haven't already been turned in.
_Click**> >>>** [**HERE**](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=84436b7692&e=a212bb87cc "Help Spread the Word") **< <<<** to help drive the message_
Make sure your family, friends, co-workers, neighbors, bring their ballots to their voting place by Monday. Try to get them in by Monday to avoid any congestion on Tuesday if you can. In Montana, elections can swing on scant few votes, make sure yours is counted.
[](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=9f8cd0c326&e=a212bb87cc)
On Team Downing, we are in a sprint to the finish. We can still use some help if you're able. Even a few dollars can help boost a social media ad, or, a few hundred can boost our radio ads. Please help if you can.
**You can donate >>>>> [HERE](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=428ca7e9b0&e=a212bb87cc) <<<<<**
_Thank you so much for your support!_ We hope to report good news on Tuesday and are prepared to roll up our sleeves and get to work on Wednesday. There is a lot of good we can do in this office and would be honored and blessed with the opportunity to work for you fighting for transparency, efficiency, choices, and lower healthcare and prescription drug costs.

Thanks and may God Bless you!

[](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=5783c0a67e&e=a212bb87cc)
-Troy

| Dear Peter, I believe that you can measure a leader by the fights they have chosen to take on. That's why I'm so proud to work for a strong leader like Abigail Spanberger. [**Here are a few of the ways that Abigail has fought for all of us in Congress: **](https://act.myngp.com/el/Und2ufpfMTedgSel8ZAk7n7mOGQ5UdsLiyM7HjWOyyY=/tUVMUAOBQrJv5d_rxPQe7UzpszbLgBvdfntuza57dRY=) [_**If you support the following work, please make a contribution to our re-election campaign today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Und2ufpfMTedgSel8ZAk7n7mOGQ5UdsLiyM7HjWOyyY=/tUVMUAOBQrJv5d_rxPQe7UzpszbLgBvdfntuza57dRY=)
* Abigail takes on the pharmaceutical industry, fighting for more transparency in the system so that we can stop the skyrocketing costs of prescription drugs
* Abigail is safeguarding our healthcare system from attacks and will always protect people with pre-existing conditions
* Abigail works to curb the influence of money and mega-donors in our political system and has fought to increase transparency and accountability in Congress
* Abigail is focused on closing the digital divide, working for rural broadband internet expansion, so that our students, farmers, small businesses owners, and veterans can access the resources they need

By no means is this list an exhaustive record of Abigail's work, but these priorities demonstrate her values, like bringing people together to find solutions that will improve the lives of Central Virginians. [**The outcome of this election could jeopardize not only the work we 've done, but also the cooperation and bipartisanship we've worked so hard to build these last two years. ****Central Virginians have experienced hyper-partisan and extreme leaders before, and we can 't afford to go back.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Und2ufpfMTedgSel8ZAk7n7mOGQ5UdsLiyM7HjWOyyY=/tUVMUAOBQrJv5d_rxPQe7UzpszbLgBvdfntuza57dRY=) Abigail will keep putting every ounce of her energy into fighting for our community and our country, but first we have to win on Tuesday. It's not too late to give. _**[Can you make a contribution to our campaign today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Und2ufpfMTedgSel8ZAk7n7mOGQ5UdsLiyM7HjWOyyY=/tUVMUAOBQrJv5d_rxPQe7UzpszbLgBvdfntuza57dRY=)**_
---

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: New Guidance, Open Enrollment, and The 3 I's
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a recap of the announcements from the past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VXB7TB4HiEXeEByfa3SnWjDGi81iE3Qa-kkM27PNlVbqJ0oW3p_uviy06Xkhj3x1OvCdQKoiDsRgBIwEFw0sytoSShZQ8204ysPRu_x4SVet-Wcuq-As4vghiCVj-HYFHP1qrLbWC-HzakT2hL_9Hk0y8nzpTeZViBpvh9ly8aUVsDdq2aoriEfB0bZaZP3pM4vldyBe23x4XrLC5kboq6RniUojrEZCFD-BA2RuuerGZ0IVWjN2RccKbcqbAyITlGXC-pvcy8D1mVk1J2pyvCXt1tPdtGHx91PNTEnN_XziX7LVEbHDMbpYoFkZLRvO8M6qbgPYlr4=&c=stJZzwhIhtH8Gl6RLiEEZ4XapfzBjpQZzwG3-NhOE0iL3w48ZEfktg==&ch=rsWErLjdMlvMc-FVDS__8kwBic42db9AJ1M-dFVFaxZ0cDeRlQAKZA==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
NEW GUIDANCE
We issued five new pieces of guidance in response to our rising COVID-19 case numbers:

1\. We're reducing the social gathering limit from 15 to 10, effective immediately.

2\. We're no longer allowing spectators at sporting events for the next two weeks.

3\. Effective Monday, we're closing all ice rinks and indoor sports facilities for one week.

4\. We're asking faith leaders to bring back virtual services and proactively encourage congregants to use that option for the next few weeks.

5\. We're working with our nursing homes and hospitals to scale back on visitation.

These are important, necessary steps to turn our case numbers around. If we rally together to sop the spread now, two weeks from now we'll be in a much better place.
| | |
---|---
|
OPEN ENROLLMENT

The open enrollment period for HealthSource RI, the state's official marketplace for health insurance coverage, starts today. Now is the time to sign up for new health coverage or renew your existing coverage.

We want you to be able to weigh your health coverage options safely, and so HealthSource is making it easier than ever to get help remotely. The call center has extended hours, live web chat support, virtual enrollment events, and an online application. If you're worried about the cost of coverage and are unsure what financial help you qualify for, reach out to HealthSource. They are here to help. 80% of people enrolled through HealthSource are eligible to receive financial assistance. You can visit [HealthSourceRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VXB7TB4HiEXeEByfa3SnWjDGi81iE3Qa-kkM27PNlVbqJ0oW3p_uvparnTygDmPoFiXxeVAfSf3KRw3crbRk54VUP1PCmuyf-4EixN0OvTIoI2SmqYXdiKmCZADHLmiwMZt6QWm47s2qRg28etS_sQ==&c=stJZzwhIhtH8Gl6RLiEEZ4XapfzBjpQZzwG3-NhOE0iL3w48ZEfktg==&ch=rsWErLjdMlvMc-FVDS__8kwBic42db9AJ1M-dFVFaxZ0cDeRlQAKZA==) for information.
| | |
---|---
|
THE 3 I'S

We've talked a lot over the last few weeks about the 3 W's, the basic rules for stopping COVID-19: wear your mask, wash your hands, and watch your distance.

As our cases rise, we also want you to avoid the 3 I's, which are the situations that are getting us into trouble. Stay away from events that are informal, indoors, and with inconsistent groups. These instances are where we're seeing the most spread.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stays engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates Thursday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VXB7TB4HiEXeEByfa3SnWjDGi81iE3Qa-kkM27PNlVbqJ0oW3p_uviy06Xkhj3x1D_2u1aY5leZf4qeZpczgdiUKxzu5uBmxibHwXLKBXI8rMdRmZXzDEVNqKQ11SdoCXTtM2_Dv1JkBJd8Tj2G7SJb78qWxDUIaFjy2wq_ZZobyMWKO8mI3ymjUGiyJzkhJzCXtWpbahAeFfHnM1G56KiMjL0af6aWRtno7AT6PVPcrzuF1MNerZJ53ZwKRqosNv8lCxn2ePKX2ffErY1L4XAjYzRGsby5mJIBJIreYynxSeXWQPNr4HeVHvsx3HbsxADqqcK8pUZA=&c=stJZzwhIhtH8Gl6RLiEEZ4XapfzBjpQZzwG3-NhOE0iL3w48ZEfktg==&ch=rsWErLjdMlvMc-FVDS__8kwBic42db9AJ1M-dFVFaxZ0cDeRlQAKZA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=d47597f3-cf33-44d3-ace3-8ac349e08bd6)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=d47597f3-cf33-44d3-ace3-8ac349e08bd6) | [About our service provider](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/service-provider?cc=about-service-provider)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by

name: Nikki Haley
subject: U.S. Army Captain Wesley Hunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress

clean_body: He’s leading the fight for Texas. | Friend, Nancy Pelosi bought two Republican congressional seats in Texas in 2018. U.S. Army Captain Wesley Hunt is the GOP nominee to win one of them back in 2020. Polls currently show that his election is tied and within the margin of error. Your last-minute support at the final hour could be what puts him over the top. Nancy Pelosi has admitted in emails to her donors that this seat in Texas could make or break her House majority. That’s why I want to be confident that I did everything I could to help Wesley win this race. In a race this close every dollar makes a difference. I hope Wesley can count on your support to give him the lead in this TIED race. Thank you, Nikki Haley 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. body:
Friend,
Election Day is almost here and we're asking for your help one last time to get Wesley across the finish line!

This Tuesday, Election Day, we are holding our very last round of block-walking, phone-banking and text-banking to remind every single supporter of Wesley to get to the polls and cast their ballot. This race is extremely close, with even Nancy Pelosi admitting that the result here could determine control of the House.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=f636e2adb3aa4f05abe82c80cead7e23&_e=0VeP8B_7ucK1gDxhcwc4msqEoZQxYl3mWKDB0jKWfbh1_NJ2gZWsmubL5GLVL3boRK_zwoXa2at_FJK8BRP08awsDDtypyEunxQnmUG1yF3Ga2TO8o8Gn5ROMw_puld8YkodiIBx56xKZhlhjUfGvLXC0wN1pme5tFv8fpTNXEItWTnunlM-8O09R-mSde8G3G7UZRdU-HQFqIU5IEzCdaTo3YBEPMm2LNYq7ixDi_A61d3KmvCZ73uiZ9Hn2uS985kivS6vaXyIIZ-Sgztoejyn1ofwthVtzfwuK_FgflDYad2diXskV3wTEmwlrckjKQDR8MKOcb-YUIFJgvxMziqNt_zPomLwS4sfqt9N7EnXsq8Gu4bMpTDXHHtrd4Ea)

Friend, this race is vital, not just to ensuring that we have Republican representation, but ensuring that we have an advocate who will stand up for the 7th Congressional District. Wesley will fight to protect the energy industry from the Green New Deal, ensure that flood mitigation projects move forward and make healthcare more affordable.

We you'll join us this Tuesday!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

clean_body: Friend, Election Day is almost here and we're asking for your help one last time to get Wesley across the finish line! This Tuesday, Election Day, we are holding our very last round of block-walking, phone-banking and text-banking to remind every single supporter of Wesley to get to the polls and cast their ballot. This race is extremely close, with even Nancy Pelosi admitting that the result here could determine control of the House. Friend, this race is vital, not just to ensuring that we have Republican representation, but ensuring that we have an advocate who will stand up for the 7th Congressional District. Wesley will fight to protect the energy industry from the Green New Deal, ensure that flood mitigation projects move forward and make healthcare more affordable. We you'll join us this Tuesday! Sincerely, Team Hunt **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Plan to vote and share voting info with others!
body:
| | Peter, We are just three days away from one of the most important elections of our lives. Your vote matters. Every vote counts. If you have not voted yet, **[find your polling place and make a plan to vote](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18HdAQlDb1n9Q0zecSwNILwd3S4Aq8yYZATSF-M5AMlkc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201101com01&n=1)!** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18HdAQlDb1n9Q0zecSwNILwd3S4Aq8yYZATSF-M5AMlkc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201101com01&n=2) Voting is your powerful opportunity to “do good” as Galatians 6:10 challenges us. It’s our chance to wisely choose the leaders who will govern our communities, states, and our nation. If you need to learn more about what’s on your ballot our voter guide will explain every candidate and referendum. Get your voter guide [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18fsb6bYz7sWlt-7NXJ7C2Xf6qBg4iG8QfSm4DqDSy90w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201101com01&n=3). If you have already voted, please pass this message along to three other Christians. It’s vital that Christians turn out to vote and have their voices heard from the local level all the way to the federal level. With just three days to go, we cannot let up now. Please share these resources before Tuesday. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18HdAQlDb1n9Q0zecSwNILwd3S4Aq8yYZATSF-M5AMlkc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201101com01&n=4) **Do Good. Go Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201101com01&n=5)
---

clean_body: | | Peter, We are just three days away from one of the most important elections of our lives. Your vote matters. Every vote counts. If you have not voted yet, ! Voting is your powerful opportunity to “do good” as Galatians 6:10 challenges us. It’s our chance to wisely choose the leaders who will govern our communities, states, and our nation. If you need to learn more about what’s on your ballot our voter guide will explain every candidate and referendum. Get your voter guide . If you have already voted, please pass this message along to three other Christians. It’s vital that Christians turn out to vote and have their voices heard from the local level all the way to the federal level. With just three days to go, we cannot let up now. Please share these resources before Tuesday. Do Good. Go Vote. Jason Yates CEO * You subscribed mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: On proving people wrong
body:
At the beginning of the campaign, as I excitedly told people I was running, I encountered a variety of responses. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a709330f928a/on-proving-people-wrong?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | At the beginning of the campaign, as I excitedly told people I was running, I encountered a variety of responses. Many of them matched my enthusiasm, but plenty of them didn’t. And unfortunately, the one that sticks out most in my mind was the powerful woman in a position of authority, the woman deeply engaged in politics, who looked at me, scoffed, and said, “Why?”

The reasons are many and mostly ideological -- we need better representation, someone who is going to serve the people of IL-16 and set an open-hearted, sincere, and wildly passionate example. We need someone who’s going to fight doggedly for the people of this district, someone who will give themselves to this work.

**But I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t also running on that proving-them-wrong energy. Every step of the way, people have been telling me “no.” **

First: No, that district was drawn for a Republican. It’s unwinnable. Then: No, your opponent isn’t the most offensive member of the House. Then: No, the data doesn’t show a path to victory. Then: No, you’re not raising enough money. No, the Senate is our priority. You haven’t paid your dues. You didn’t kiss any rings. You’re not moderating your message enough. You’re not well-behaved enough. You’re not...enough. _**Enough. **_ Help me prove them wrong. Again. And once I’m elected, let’s keep doing it. Again and again and again. [I know you’re with me. Show me.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=1ce84d597b&e=140a9b81e7) Dani
---

name: Team Mace

body:
ONLY 2 DAYS UNTIL THE ELECTION 🇺🇸 Can you believe it? We can't. | |
---
**WEEK IN REVIEW**
**ONLY 2 DAYS UNTIL THE ELECTION 🇺🇸**

Can you believe it? We can't. Our last full week of the campaign has been hectic. Between getting out the vote and getting on the air, Nancy and the rest of Team Mace have been working overtime and loving every minute.

We started out the week with a new justice to the Supreme Court, Amy Coney Barrett, who made history as the first mother of school-aged children to sit on the dias. Nancy participated in the Charleston Rotary Club's Candidate Forum on Tuesday with her opponent, Democrat Joe Cunningham.

On Wednesday, Nancy joined Rep. Ralph Norman and Rep. Joe Wilson in an op-ed highlighting their efforts to protect Parris Island since Joe Cunningham and his liberal colleagues put it on the chopping block. Big thanks to our surrogates on the trail, including Tennessee Senator Marsha Blackburn who joined Charlie James to discuss our race.

To top it all off, Lisa Desjardins and PBS NewsHour spotlighted our campaign and the record number of Republican women running this election cycle.

Keep up with our Week in Review to hear from Team Mace each week. Invite your friends and family to sign up at nancymace.org. 📩

Thank you for your support!

-Mara, Campaign Manager
|
---

subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Larry Sylvester for School Board
body:
I entered this race for School Board because I wanted to be a part of ensuring | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larrysylvester.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=92bf0220b7c9b43b02ebf051f&id=7b15883acb&e=a5c6b39366)
---
|
---
| I entered this race for School Board because I wanted to be a part of ensuring we have strong schools and a strong future for my children and yours. As a former middle and high school teacher, professor, and Dean of College, I've seen how dedicated our educators are to ensuring our children are prepared to hit the ground running after high school. I am ready to get to work as your next School Board Member for DeSoto County by helping to formulate policy that has a positive impact on their classrooms.
It will be my mission to listen and learn – then lead – on issues that allow us to continue improving the academic excellence and outstanding extracurricular activities for which we have become known. I sincerely appreciate your vote and any support you are willing to give in helping me reach that goal on Tuesday. Dr. Larry Sylvester

clean_body: I entered this race for School Board because I wanted to be a part of ensuring | | | | | | | I entered this race for School Board because I wanted to be a part of ensuring we have strong schools and a strong future for my children and yours. As a former middle and high school teacher, professor, and Dean of College, I've seen how dedicated our educators are to ensuring our children are prepared to hit the ground running after high school. I am ready to get to work as your next School Board Member for DeSoto County by helping to formulate policy that has a positive impact on their classrooms. It will be my mission to listen and learn – then lead – on issues that allow us to continue improving the academic excellence and outstanding extracurricular activities for which we have become known. I sincerely appreciate your vote and any support you are willing to give in helping me reach that goal on Tuesday. Dr. Larry Sylvester | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Larry Sylvester for DeSoto County School Board. subject: Friend, the win is in sight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Your financial investment is crucial in helping us get voters to the polls in the next few days. | |
---
| | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=077e567955&e=5886ca081d)
---
|

Dear Friend,

I have spent the weekend going over the numbers. _We can win this._

More than **140,000 people in our district have already voted.** Based on our data of those who've voted, we're winning.**Let me say that again: We are winning. **And it is because of your help, Friend.

This is a people-powered campaign. It always has been. Thanks to your belief in and support of this campaign, our path to victory is in sight.

---
| [DONATE TO WIN](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=361d187662&e=5886ca081d "DONATE TO WIN")
---
|
Over the past two months, together we've made over **40,000 calls and 50,000 texts** to voters in this District telling them about Pat's message. [We can't slow down now.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=f9f15fd09c&e=5886ca081d)

These final three days are the grand finale of our campaign efforts. We still have thousands of calls to make and text messages to send to ensure our supporters are going to get to the polls by Nov. 3, and we need to keep our commercials on air so voters hear Pat's message for Dignity and Justice for All.
---
| [DONATE TO GOTV!](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b6ccddaeba&e=5886ca081d "DONATE TO GOTV!")
---
|
**We often hear how this District has been gerrymandered to help Republicans. It's true. But it is also true that if everyone in this District voted, we would win. In 2012, Jackie won this Congressional seat with 49% of the vote. Since that time, the majority of new voter registrants have been Democratic. And we have more Democrats who do not vote each year than Republicans.**

We’ve got the numbers, it’s about getting them to the polls. [We are counting on your help to win this.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=e7c6157c56&e=5886ca081d)

Patrick

name: Ethan
subject: Did you see it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
Peter,
Did you get a chance to watch 60 Minutes this evening? It showed exactly why we need to make sure voters hear our message. Our team's been calling thousands of voters and you'd be amazed how many voters still need to be inspired to vote, or need to be persuaded to vote for the _entire_ ticket, not just the President. Our ad, "Truth Matters," which aired tonight during 60 Minutes, cost $5,000, but it reached thousands of the voters we need to inform and inspire!
There's still time to invest in this race and reach the voters who will help us swing Ohio. We're still adding last minute communications to our program. [To chip in to support our digital program and getting voters to the polls, please click here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/crPqVTbzeyhk8tDQmwgSoDpDhzub7LfK5EaFBaunB-Y=?refcode=11.1post)
Thank you again for all your support and encouragement during a campaign that's required us to fight hard to be sure the truth shines through the lies.
Sincerely,
Ethan
| | | |
---
**_Ohio is the bellwether._** Tune in to 60 Minutes tonight to hear from Ohio voters, and see our ad! All eyes are on Ohio because the polls in Ohio are neck and neck. We can take back our country and Ohio can make clear what the outcome of the election is on November 3. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/c7CAGF5jHrr-8U1jbKxYrvcE0KQkbuj1G4qsHCzqszM=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/c7CAGF5jHrr-8U1jbKxYrvcE0KQkbuj1G4qsHCzqszM=) So many of you chipped in to get us the funds we needed to run an ad which will tonight reach thousands of voters who have been fed non-stop lies by my opponent. **Thank you.** **[If you can, there 's still time to chip in another $15 to help us continue ad buys and keep our campaign strong in order to keep reaching voters through election day.](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/crPqVTbzeyhk8tDQmwgSoDpDhzub7LfK5EaFBaunB-Y=?refcode=11.1&amount=15)** Thank you for your support! Sincerely, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/hQAHadk1AS3M23k-fHdlHWFWtY2xdE1EgJ8qFKd2iLw=?refcode=11.1&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/hQAHadk1AS3M23k-fHdlHWFWtY2xdE1EgJ8qFKd2iLw=?refcode=11.1&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/hQAHadk1AS3M23k-fHdlHWFWtY2xdE1EgJ8qFKd2iLw=?refcode=11.1&amount=255) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/hQAHadk1AS3M23k-fHdlHWFWtY2xdE1EgJ8qFKd2iLw=?refcode=11.1&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/hQAHadk1AS3M23k-fHdlHWFWtY2xdE1EgJ8qFKd2iLw=?refcode=11.1) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/u_WghKzNvxpSOfCzPF1_I1iR4xf3-_cWR6AUbhTGMqc=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/Uk86vDDKGxYQ_JqMpfwEkhoFdLyUHYhLdTHQjaPjbX4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/JSJMKF2EOEl9EKV0QQLtSYqcPwcDWiFK8NEPSVXG7as=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/51CZxkMyUZ5hhP8OTnuPl-DllI04Z7g40s6GR6xLpbY=/eoZx-Q3CTmiT_Cp9VJGZlz4DNuggSuelFU7Zql5sk3k=)
