name: Team Warner
subject: This all comes down to turnout.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
More than two million Virginians have already cast their ballots, but we need to make sure that we keep voter turnout up so we can send Mark Warner back to Washington and elect Democrats up and down t
|
---

| | Derek --

There are just _**two days**_ until Election Day. More than two million Virginians have already cast their ballots, but we need to make sure that we keep voter turnout up so we can send Mark Warner back to Washington and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. | **[Pitch in toward our $10,000 goal to help us mobilize voters over the next two days.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9fc/53d9897e/551bbd0f/1c88cfc0/1955461721/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twodays?refcode=20201101_f_2_nd__938__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**
---
We've seen this before -- high voter turnout in the Commonwealth won't just help Mark win re-election -- it'll give Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Virginia Democrats all the way down the ballot a boost. When you support our voter mobilization efforts you'll be helping to start a _giant blue wave_ that will wash across the entire Commonwealth.

Derek, we can't leave _anything_ to chance this year. We're working nonstop in these final days to help Mark win his race -- and to help other Democrats like Joe Biden and House candidates win theirs. **But it will all depend on how many voters we can turn out between now and Tuesday.

[Can you help us meet our goal so we can reach as many voters as possible before November 3rd?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9fc/53d9897e/551bbd0f/1c88cfcf/1955461721/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twodays?refcode=20201101_f_2_nd__938__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support -- we couldn't do this without you!

Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9fc/53d9897e/551bbd0f/1c88cfce/1955461721/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twodays?refcode=20201101_f_2_nd__938__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

subject: Wow, friend, did you see this poll?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mowers for Congress |
body:
The University of New Hampshire released their latest Granite State Poll and we can’t believe it. | |
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=c55576fae3c749079d0c31ff2f3a5156&_e=UZNLcZLPZbPix_45A6q4PxRtyTwXjYyyyKt9S3acOQ3Okib7JNYuBrXRbVG-6lLxvTo5hM9595FUXhoRNda_l5WDEwjIFzlLnJbcT-wB1Wcy03Tc8tc5pHIfLcb_NWHAqa_2axtgMSpSm6aq36KDl8cppFEIvBm025Wp-5-53KYNlFc0qijdjafa8LsYTANuQ2nJfWv66ox6JV5H9NSsVSO-MAGC83aKCp0FaEAP2ewEEqDMxpl_J3kRKIAMYlZ7wcPC1mQFq0q9O9PiZzcdNDjURABjtQsHLCvVQGDkOds2VIkjyePiRZebsXbQb68DfcAokaQZSykqnVt2Up_owsTM31LfZ4770YnowoI5fsPeAXFjAbyotKHk9N0-MOnFR-6bRkKz7FqsUOyLfdUCpg8jdcaFwVG6TqJlpK3hDAI1bkjCwI4ks9aRkWHw8Y6tdwIY9BQAuY67QwnGLt9bpIv-QKK9Mm4D8-QgYwXvSlevZTyuCMX7JecG2wK7fzUU)
|
---
Hey friend \- this is big.

**The University of New Hampshire just released their latest Granite State Poll and we can’t believe it.**

We knew the race was going to be very tight. Real Clear Politics even called it a “toss up” earlier this week.

**With just two days to go until Election Day, Matt Mowers is up 50% - 48% over Pappas.** Friend, we were down 18 points last month. I have NEVER seen a surge like this before - and it’s happening at exactly the right time.
|
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=c55576fae3c749079d0c31ff2f3a5156&_e=UZNLcZLPZbPix_45A6q4PxRtyTwXjYyyyKt9S3acOQ3Okib7JNYuBrXRbVG-6lLxvTo5hM9595FUXhoRNda_l5WDEwjIFzlLnJbcT-wB1Wcy03Tc8tc5pHIfLcb_NWHAqa_2axtgMSpSm6aq36KDl8cppFEIvBm025Wp-5-53KYNlFc0qijdjafa8LsYTANuQ2nJfWv66ox6JV5H9NSsVSO-MAGC83aKCp0FaEAP2ewEEqDMxpl_J3kRKIAMYlZ7wcPC1mQFq0q9O9PiZzcdNDjURABjtQsHLCvVQGDkOdsQQAyNrQg-27vcamepe0957c3Uy6xQFbfSCvoHWXi8ofcc6ww1v7alzXRpMG3nXZ3euzWuzJenn-pPMRsrgcu995gAPk12tkBJQaEbShzdKvdhFCsfSphEZo-tUVsTF-36FJaMdAaNBxvnUUdvIwFxyFzgj30v8MK0t0j5L17nJM5CmhiZ3AGlFZYmHQztAi_q0xqexZt4vG-kO1xkH5iG)
|
---
Why the surge? Because the people of New Hampshire are tired of politics as usual. They’re tired of corrupt politicians who lie about relationships with lobbyists. And they’re tired of not being represented by someone who cares about them and their values.

We’re asking for a lot from you during these last few days of the campaign, but **[Matt needs your support now more than ever. We can’t let this momentum stop now.](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=c55576fae3c749079d0c31ff2f3a5156&_e=UZNLcZLPZbPix_45A6q4PxRtyTwXjYyyyKt9S3acOQ3Okib7JNYuBrXRbVG-6lLxvTo5hM9595FUXhoRNda_l5WDEwjIFzlLnJbcT-wB1Wcy03Tc8tc5pHIfLcb_NWHAqa_2axtgMSpSm6aq36KDl8cppFEIvBm025Wp-5-53KYNlFc0qijdjafa8LsYTANuQ2nJfWv66ox6JV5H9NSsVSO-MAGC83aKCp0FaEAP2ewEEqDMxpl_J3kRKIAMYlZ7wcPC1mQFq0q9O9PiZzcdNDjURABjtQsHLCvVQGDkOdvGh6WfoOhUSs1YMdPz2C0ytw8D32DM4wztdGAK_YJx7w_Y1ihQwf0M4Jdl0JiMqENzG4R0QMiSFg8U63UtQGZ47VjIgVToeO2qEAyppcPTBYvYesbdxE7G38Z9G5SdVN_lCvJI7t_CgaXt_sMjHMwt29JyZCK0gabWVMi7pVVBHORlu15fM83wAh9YZh1Z9-3zXlRG3BYUaoV_Yuxt5iKD)**
|

clean_body: The University of New Hampshire released their latest Granite State Poll and we can’t believe it. | | | Hey friend \- this is big. The University of New Hampshire just released their latest Granite State Poll and we can’t believe it. We knew the race was going to be very tight. Real Clear Politics even called it a “toss up” earlier this week. With just two days to go until Election Day, Matt Mowers is up 50% - 48% over Pappas. Friend, we were down 18 points last month. I have NEVER seen a surge like this before - and it’s happening at exactly the right time. | | Why the surge? Because the people of New Hampshire are tired of politics as usual. They’re tired of corrupt politicians who lie about relationships with lobbyists. And they’re tired of not being represented by someone who cares about them and their values. We’re asking for a lot from you during these last few days of the campaign, but | By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you’ve saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. | With your help, I know we can fire Corrupt Chris Pappas on Tuesday. Thanks, John with Team Mowers | While Chris Pappas can count on Nancy Pelosi's deep pockets for funding, Matt Mowers is running a campaign funded by supporters like you. #
Hello!

We wanted to make sure that you got an invitation to our [Election Night Virtual Celebration. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=0ee71419e1&e=140a9b81e7)

Your support is the reason we've gotten this far, and when we cross the finish line at 7 pm we want to celebrate with you! Join us and hear from Dani, and other candidates running for office throughout IL-16 as we watch the results come in!

Even though we can't have the type of get-together we all envisioned, we can still celebrate together this Tuesday! [Click here to register for the event](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c21cad1b08&e=140a9b81e7), and we'll see you there!

Thank you for all your support.

Team Dani

P.S. We still need help making calls to get out the vote down this last stretch! [Can we count on you to make some calls?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=533f0310a7&e=140a9b81e7)

body:
Dr. Hiral Tipirneni and I need the resources to turn out voters in both of our competitive House districts: for us and Mark Kelly! | | | Hi there, Dr. Hiral Tipirneni and I need the resources to turn out voters in both of our competitive House districts: for us and Mark Kelly! name: Lee Griffin For Congress
subject: Lee's Newsletter
body:
Hi everyone, I hope you’re doing well. With only two days until the election, this is our final push. The positive energy and exciteme
| | [**Can't See This Message?**_View in a browser_****](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/0bNM5Mhb3/c?w=egBLnN3Awo0nPz_hvlkepv7-jjJcvK_L0yH-A72RaHc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9zby8wYk5NNU1oYjMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Hi everyone, I hope you're doing well. With only two days until the election, this is our final push. The positive energy and excitement I've seen this past week has been incredible, and it gives me hope and optimism for the coming week and for the future. On Friday, Green New Deal Lewisburg endorsed me as their first-ever candidate endorsement. I am so honored that they chose to take this step with my campaign, and I am grateful for their help and support. I share their passion and commitment to passing on a better, more sustainable world to our children and grandchildren and will champion that vision in office. On Sunday, I spoke at a rally hosted by Action Together NEPA and Black Lives Matter Wilkes-Barre alongside other candidates including Michelle Siegel (SD-27) where we emphasized how our work for a more just and equitable country doesn't stop on election day.
---
| | The real work starts after the election, and thanks to the work of grassroots organizers like Daryl Lewis of Action Together NEPA, pictured with me here, we will move our country and our society forward.
---
|
---
| |
---
| I was in State College on Wednesday with State Rep. Scott Conklin, PSU Democrats President Jacob Klipstein, and Senator Harris's husband, Doug Emhoff. It was a pleasure and honor to share the stage with them and to have the opportunity to address a crowd of voters so enthusiastic about building a better future for all of us.
---
| | Today I joined Senator Bob Casey at Get Out The Vote events in Selinsgrove and Lewisburg, along with candidates for state office, including Michelle Siegel (SD-27), Katie Evans (HD-85) and Amanda Waldman (HD-84). It was invigorating to see such a great turnout even in inclement weather and to hear from such capable and passionate leaders.
---
|
---
| | Seeing such outstanding support this past week for our Democratic candidates up and down the ballot gives me a lot of hope not just for election day but for the months and years ahead. We have worked all year to build momentum not just for a candidate or an issue, but for the belief that our best days are ahead of us. And with that momentum and energy, we will build a future that we will all be proud of. Now we have to make sure our voices are heard. If you've already voted by mail or early in-person, thank you. If you have not voted yet, please make sure you have a plan to vote and make sure everyone you know has a plan to vote. If you haven't turned in your mail-in ballot, bring it with you to your polling station. Check on your elderly neighbors to see if they need help safely getting to the polls. If you have any questions or concerns on election day, call the PA Voter Hotline at 1-877-868-3772. We need to get everyone's vote counted to bring this country back together and step forward into a brighter day. Again, thank you so much for your support and belief in me. The future is ours,
Lee
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/0bNM5Mhb3/c?w=1363dvlo3gg9gdYFtM35D8MUcvQp_kSXB0Ib6hJLX8k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xlZWdyaWZmaW5mb3Jjb25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiJiMDk0MDYwNS04NGEyLTQxNWQtZDE2OC05ZDdkOGExYTdkMmMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)
---
| [**PO Box 1294 Williamsport, PA 17703**](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/0bNM5Mhb3/c?w=epFS7r0rBoZw6jadBR0ohDYhXd2uw6FOd4-tiBt9A-M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYXBzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vP3E9UE8rQm94KzEyOTQrV2lsbGlhbXNwb3J0JTJDK1BBKzE3NzAzIiwiciI6ImY2Yjc2YjBiLTZhYzgtNGFhYS1mOWRiLWYwYmVkODQyZTQwNSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImZmOTFhMjBkLWRiMTktNDRkNS1iM2VlLTliM2Y4ZGIwYmMyZSJ9)

body:
The Democrats running for Corporation Commission are running on an agenda to INCREASE your utility rates & kill thousands of jobs! STOP THEM BY VOTING | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b75065185aa6/jim-oconnor-for-corporation-commission-vote-now-3566170?e=66a0c3ba26)
---

---
| |
# PROTECT ARIZONANS...
VOTE JIM O'CONNOR FOR ARIZONA CORPORATION COMMISSION
_I refuse to cave to the dangerous agenda that Democrats on the Commission are proposing_ _!_
_**The Democrats running for Corporation Commission are proposing an agenda to INCREASE your utility rates & kill thousands of jobs!**_

This is unacceptable. Arizona has worked too hard over the years to create a diversified, robust, reliable energy infrastructure. I won't allow the Democrats' out-of-state political agenda to hurt the people of our state.

_It should scare all of us that the Democrats running for the Commission want to INCREASE our utility rates and kill thousands of Arizona jobs by putting in place California-style energy policies—the very same policies that have led them to face annual rolling blackouts in the middle of summer._

[**I'm sorry, but policies that could lead to rolling blackouts during an Arizona summer aren't just bad energy policies... they put lives at risk.**](https://JimOConnorAZ.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba896a4e13ec36a57f881fff1&id=8ab0b03ed4&e=66a0c3ba26) I make you this promise: I will always work to save you money, protect Arizona jobs, and keep Arizonans safe.
---
|
---
|
# TURN IN YOUR BALLOT NOW!

Democrats are out-voting Republicans 2-to-1 in some areas of Arizona!

Arizona Republicans, **_if you haven't already turned in your ballot please do it now and cast your vote for me and the rest of the common sense Republican team for Corporation Commission._**

Find out about Republican candidates [HERE](https://JimOConnorAZ.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba896a4e13ec36a57f881fff1&id=7edef27b0f&e=66a0c3ba26).

Find out where to vote [HERE](https://JimOConnorAZ.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba896a4e13ec36a57f881fff1&id=b2837722c8&e=66a0c3ba26).

**This election is the most important election of our lifetime.
We need YOUR vote.**

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c7/53d9897e/5515851b/1c88cfcb/2647267365/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

Mark Warner is working hard in the Senate to make life better for every Virginian. Our team will continue to send these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with Mark's priorities.

**With just a few days until Election Day, here 's what Mark is up to: **
* **[Mark visited with folks in Harrisonburg](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c7/53d9897e/5515851b/1c88cfca/2647267365/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.whsv.com/2020/10/27/senator-mark-warner-thanks-voting-volunteers/")** and thanked the community for getting the vote out early. He spoke about his support for the Affordable Care Act and the critical need for every Virginian to have access to fast and reliable broadband internet, especially during the pandemic.

* **[_The Richmond Free Press_ endorsed Mark](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c7/53d9897e/5515851b/1c88cfc9/2647267365/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "http://richmondfreepress.com/news/2020/oct/29/mark-r-warner-us-senate/")** because of his work to protect the health care of more than 400,000 Virginians and preserving the Affordable Care Act, his legislation that would invest in low-income communities and businesses especially hit hard during the pandemic, and his efforts to prevent veterans suicide and protect military families.

* Mark **[spoke about his plans to push for more relief in the Senate during the pandemic](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c7/53d9897e/5515851b/1c88cfc8/2647267365/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wsls.com/news/local/2020/10/28/democrat-mark-warner-seeks-third-term-in-us-senate/")** , and how he makes protecting health care for Virginians and building back our economy his top priorities.

* As the pandemic continues to prove that the internet is a necessary utility and not a luxury, **[Mark spoke with community members](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c7/53d9897e/5515851b/1c88cf37/2647267365/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wsls.com/news/local/2020/10/28/sen-mark-warner-vows-to-continue-expanding-broadband-in-southwest-virginia/")** in South Boston about his plan to continue with local, state, and federal governments to provide broadband access for everyone in Southside Virginia.

* Mark has always fought in the defense of Southwestern Virginians with pre-existing conditions and to ensure that everyone in Southwest Virginia has access to quality, affordable health care. With the threat of the repeal of the Affordable Care Act looming, a vote for **[Mark will ensure the protection of the health care of more than 400,000 Virginians](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c7/53d9897e/5515851b/1c88cf36/2647267365/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://roanoke.com/opinion/letters/letter-vote-for-mark-warner-and-joe-biden/article_e3b3d472-a360-5929-aee7-12de403d9b45.html")**.

* Mark stopped by **[Bibleway Cathedral in Danville](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c7/53d9897e/5515851b/1c88cf35/2647267365/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://godanriver.com/news/local/govt-and-politics/warner-visits-danville-speaks-at-bibleway-cathedral/collection_8f92641d-ae4a-5599-a481-7a23f5a73f7d.html#anchor_item_1")** and spoke to members of the congregation about his plans to refinance student loans, advocate for meaningful police reform and accountability in our justice system, and the importance of voting in this upcoming election.

* Election Day is just TWO days away! Creating the change you want to see in Virginia and in our country starts with making your voice heard on November 3rd. Make your plan to vote on Election Day at [**www.iwillvote.com**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c7/53d9897e/5515851b/1c88cf34/2647267365/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/").

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c7/53d9897e/5515851b/1c88cf33/2647267365/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201101_e_3_fl__936__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c7/53d9897e/5515851b/1c88cf32/2647267365/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9c7/53d9897e/5515851b/1c88cf31/2647267365/VEsHBA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

subject: ✨Wish Pat and Rita a Happy Anniversary!✨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
In celebration of Pat and Rita’s 22nd Anniversary, how about a donation toward Dignity and Justice for All? | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=7800060ec3&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | **Happy Anniversary, Pat and Rita!**

---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=4f4c4a84b6&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
Dear Friend,

Today, Pat and Rita celebrate their 22nd Anniversary! Nonetheless, they are hard at work today making calls, reaching out to voters, and getting out the vote.

As the tradition goes, the first anniversary is celebrated with paper, the 25th with silver, the 50th with diamonds. [In celebration of Pat and Rita’s 22nd Anniversary, how about a donation toward Dignity and Justice for All?](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=217fe5ad42&e=5886ca081d)

---
| [DONATE EXPRESS $25](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=3855e22638&e=5886ca081d "DONATE EXPRESS $25")
---
| [DONATE EXPRESS $50](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=abc62ae712&e=5886ca081d "DONATE EXPRESS $50")
---
| [DONATE EXPRESS $100](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=a1e4131707&e=5886ca081d "DONATE EXPRESS $100")
---
| [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=a828e0babe&e=5886ca081d "DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
|
**In these final two days, your donation is critical in our layered GOTV efforts.** This includes TV, digital, phone calls, and texts. More than 140,000 people in this District have already cast their vote, but there are just as many registered voters who still need to get to the polls.

We need to win this on Nov. 3 for health care, the economy, human rights, education, and so much more –– including Pat and Rita’s marriage. [Give them the gift of your donation, and send Pat to Congress to represent all people, not just the few.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=51afb3703a&e=5886ca081d)

Stay strong and resolute. We’re almost there!
Team Hackett

---

| Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.
